creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #3)
Moin moin 

But that's unfortunately how Qt works -- qmake is the gateway to all the path information. And the cmake scripts therefore rely on it too. 

That's why you see may Qt5 ports having the "buildtools:build qmake:build" in their USE_QT.


mfg Tobias
